description: for await over a true async iterable (object with Symbol.asyncIterator): drives the async-iterator protocol (it=obj[Symbol.asyncIterator](); loop {value,done}=await it.next()), with runtime fallback to the Phase-1 sync-iterable-wrapping path when Symbol.asyncIterator is absent. Also exercises the object-literal-method this-binding fix (this.i inside a factory-returned iterator).

expect.stdout:
async 0
async 1
async 2
gen 0
gen 10
gen 20
p1 100
p1 200
pair 1 a
pair 2 b
